schemas.title: aircraft
schemas.description: An object describing an individual aircraft. It should be an object in aircraft, named using MMSI or a UUID

schemas.title: aid to navigation
schemas.description: An object describing an individual aid to navigation. It should be an object in aton, named using MMSI or a UUID

schemas.title: definitions
schemas.description: Reusable definitions of core object types

schemas.title: SignalK Delta message schema
schemas.description: Schema for defining updates and subscriptions to parts of a SignalK data model, for example for communicating updates of data

schemas.title: SignalK Discovery
schemas.description: Schema for SignalK discovery resources used to locate server endpoints.
A bounding box as defined by GeoJSON

schemas.title: crs
schemas.description: a Coordinate Reference System object

schemas.title: Geo JSON object
schemas.description: Schema for a Geo JSON object

schemas.title: geometry
schemas.description: One geometry as defined by GeoJSON

schemas.title: communication
schemas.description: Schema describing the communication child-object of a Vessel.

schemas.title: design
schemas.description: An object describing the vessels primary dimensions and statistics.

schemas.title: Electrical Properties
schemas.description: Schema describing the electrical child-object of a Vessel.

schemas.title: environment
schemas.description: Schema describing the environmental child-object of a Vessel.

schemas.title: navigation
schemas.description: Schema describing the navigation child-object of a Vessel.

schemas.title: performance
schemas.description: Schema describing the performance child-object of a Vessel.

schemas.title: propulsion
schemas.description: An engine, named by a unique name within this vessel

schemas.title: resources
schemas.description: Resources to aid in navigation and operation of the vessel

schemas.title: sails
schemas.description: An object describing the vessels sails if the vessel is a sailboat.

schemas.title: sensor
schemas.description: An object describing an individual sensor. It should be an object in vessel, named using a unique name or UUID

schemas.title: sources
schemas.description: Metadata about the sources, eg. buses and connected sensors

schemas.title: steering
schemas.description: Schema describing the steering child-object of a vessel.
A tank, named by a unique identifier

schemas.title: SignalK Websockets Hello message schema
schemas.description: Schema for defining the hello message passed from the server to a client following succesful websocket connection

schemas.title: SignalK Auth message schema
schemas.description: Schema for authentication messages

schemas.title: SignalK GET message schema
schemas.description: Schema for getting values of parts of a SignalK data model, for example the state of the anchor watch

schemas.title: SignalK PUT message schema
schemas.description: Schema for request/response updates to parts of a SignalK data model, for example turning on anchor watch

schemas.title: SignalK SUBSCRIBE message schema
schemas.description: A message to allow a client to subscribe for data updates from a signalk server

schemas.title: SignalK UNSUBSCRIBE message schema
schemas.description: A message to allow a client to unsubscribe from data updates from a signalk server

schemas.title: Search and rescue beacons
schemas.description: An object describing an individual SAR beacon, eg EPIRB or transponser. It should be an object in sar, named using MMSI or a UUID

schemas.title: SignalK
schemas.description: Root schema of Signal K. Contains the list of vessels plus a reference to the local boat (also contained in the vessels list).

schemas.title: vessel
schemas.description: An object describing an individual vessel. It should be an object in vessels, named using MMSI or a UUID
